sections.paragraph:
verb לחלוץ

to draw, take off, pull; reveal; give halitzah (Jewish ritual whereby a widow is freed from the biblical obligation of marrying her brother-in-law)

verb להיחלץ

be delivered, to escape; be ready for; pioneer; be drawn, taken off, pulled; to get halitza (Jewish ritual whereby a widow is freed from the biblical obligation of marrying her brother-in-law)

verb לחלץ

to deliver, rescue; remove, extricate; extract

verb חולץ

be delivered, rescued; removed, extracted

verb לחלץ (>>חילץ)

to deliver, rescue; remove, extricate

masculine noun חלציים

loins, hips, coxae
